chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمِرَاءِ وَ الْخُصُومَةِ وَ مُعَادَاةِ الرِّجَالِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 120 – The quarreling, and the disputing, and the animosity to the men

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/141)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/141)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ زَرَعَ الْعَدَاوَةَ حَصَدَ مَا بَذَرَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from one of his companions, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who cultivates the enmity would reap what he sows’.
en.sarwar: 12. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from certain individuals of his people in a marfu’ manner the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever plants animosity will reap what he has sown.’”
